multiplexerRole.description: A signal's role in message multiplexing.

role.description: `multiplexor` = the selector signal; `multiplexed` = present only for specific selector values listed in `ids`; `none` = always present.

multiplexorName.description: Name of the multiplexor signal that gates this one (when role = multiplexed).

ids.description: Multiplexor values for which this signal is present (when role = multiplexed).

multiplexing.description: Message-level multiplexing summary. Per-signal detail lives in each signal's `multiplexer`.
